use_cases: Displaying a loading state while content is being fetched or processed
Indicating that an action is in progress during form submissions
Providing visual feedback during page transitions or navigation
Showing ongoing background operations in dashboards or applications
Replacing skeleton loaders during initial page rendering
ai_summary: A minimal loading spinner component featuring a rotating red circle with black bordered dots positioned around a central glowing circle. Built with styled-components using CSS keyframe animations for continuous 360-degree rotation. The flat design uses solid colors and basic geometric shapes, making it a lightweight, universal loading indicator suitable for any interface requiring feedback during asynchronous operations.
